creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Philipp,

This has already been discussed in ports@, where Brooks Davis cited a commit to textproc/py-sphinx-markdown-tables as the culprit[1]. It seems that a fix for sphinx is now being awaited ...

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2022-August/002444.html


For me, disabling the DOCS option of devel/llvm13 helps as a workaround. Then llvm13 builds and installs fine ;)

HTH,
Rainer
